title: hahnia suecica var. mougeotii
intro: Hahnia suecica var. mougeotii, also known as Hahnia, is a type of lichen-forming fungus that belongs to the family Hahniaceae. It is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate the immune system and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Hahnia suecica var. mougeotii include its potential to reduce inflammation and fight off infections, making it a useful natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Hahnia suecica var. mougeotii are typically made by infusing the lichen in hot water or alcohol to create a medicinal tea or tincture.
